title: Add UNIQUE constraint and indexes on UserAccount
description: Append 3 DDL statements to DatabaseInitializer.SCHEMA_QUERIES — UNIQUE constraint on UserAccount.user_id, lookup INDEX on user_id, lookup INDEX on status. Verify logConstraintStatus() surfaces all three new entries after a clean boot.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN application boots against clean Neo4j → THEN DatabaseInitializer creates rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique and logs its name; WHEN application restarts with constraint already present → THEN IF NOT EXISTS DDL is idempotent and startup proceeds; WHEN two UserAccount nodes share same user_id on write → THEN Neo4j rejects with Neo.ClientError.Schema.ConstraintValidationFailed; SHALL expose explicit lookup index rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx independent of constraint-backed index; SHALL index UserAccount(status) for future filter queries without a second migration; ref: specs/user-identity-schema/spec.md:3-20 (R1), 22-34 (R2), 60-67 (R4); design.md:50-88 (D1/D2/D3)
review_initial_requirements: D1 rejected composite (user_id, username) constraint and index-only approach — ensure chosen UNIQUE CONSTRAINT name matches rhizodelta_ prefix used by Human_Post.author_id idx at DatabaseInitializer.java:36; D3 rejected deferring status and numeric enum form — status MUST be string 'ACTIVE'; all three DDL additions MUST be idempotent via IF NOT EXISTS
review_regression_requirements: Rollback: DROP CONSTRAINT rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique IF EXISTS; DROP INDEX rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx IF EXISTS; DROP INDEX rhizodelta_user_account_status_idx IF EXISTS — previous build must boot and accept registrations after drop; pre-existing rhizodelta_user_account_username_unique constraint MUST remain untouched; ref: design.md:129-144
notes: Phase 0 of broader user-domain roadmap per docs/user-domain-modeling-plan.md; foundation for later phases (user-profile-split / user-authored-edge / user-personalization-relationships); confirmed decisions: Neo4j remains primary user store, AUTHORED will become authoritative semantic in later phase, online backfill accepted for later phases; this change itself contains no data backfill; picked_reason:UIC-01 为 user_id 主键约束与查询索引落库，且依赖的 UIC-02 已完成; evidence:新增 UserAccount.user_id 唯一约束、user_id 显式索引、status 索引，并把 schema 校验日志扩展到同时查询 SHOW CONSTRAINTS 与 SHOW INDEXES; validation_limited:未在真实 Neo4j 上执行 clean boot 校验，logConstraintStatus 是否实际打印出 3 个新条目仅由单测验证查询覆盖; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn test -Dtest=DatabaseInitializerTest; evidence:8 个 DatabaseInitializerTest 通过，覆盖新增 DDL、索引日志查询以及 UIC-02 预检回归; risk:medium 缺少真实数据库冷启动证据，新增约束与显式 user_id 索引在某些 Neo4j 版本下可能存在建索引顺序或冗余提示差异; done_at:2026-04-21

title: Add read-only user_id integrity pre-check blocking boot on violation
description: Implement verifyUserIdIntegrity() in DatabaseInitializer running before SCHEMA_QUERIES loop. Execute two read-only Cypher queries (null/blank + duplicate user_id, LIMIT 20 each). Throw IllegalStateException listing up to 20 offending usernames or user_ids on violation. Strictly no SET/MERGE/CREATE/DELETE.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN pre-check runs and every UserAccount has non-null non-blank unique user_id → THEN startup proceeds to SCHEMA_QUERIES loop; WHEN pre-check finds user_id IS NULL or trim(user_id)='' → THEN IllegalStateException names up to 20 offending usernames and Spring Boot exits non-zero; WHEN pre-check finds duplicate user_id values → THEN exception includes offending user_id plus associated usernames (up to 20); WHEN pre-check runs against any UserAccount data → THEN no property is written, no relationship created, no node deleted; MUST NOT perform automatic repairs; ref: specs/user-identity-schema/spec.md:36-58 (R3)
review_initial_requirements: D4 rejected auto-repair (silent identity mutation = worst outcome) and WARN-only mode (defeats contract enforcement) — pre-check MUST hard-fail; verify pre-check Cypher contains ONLY MATCH/WITH/RETURN, zero SET/MERGE/CREATE/DELETE (static inspection); pre-check MUST be wired as FIRST step of initializeSchema() so CONSTRAINT DDL never fires with dirty data and operators get an actionable message instead of generic ConstraintValidationFailed; LIMIT 20 caps pre-check cost on large datasets
review_regression_requirements: Fail-open risk: any exception in pre-check itself (not a data violation) MUST still abort startup, never silently skip; regression perf baseline — pre-check completes in seconds even at 100k users; Spring Boot MUST exit non-zero on IllegalStateException from @PostConstruct (verify); if pre-check is ever relaxed to warning semantics, rollback requires removing the method entirely not flipping a flag
notes: Hard prerequisite for UIC-01 constraint DDL — MUST execute first; realistic failure mode = test/seeded data without user_id since AuthController.createUser already assigns UUID; design.md Open Q1 — audit dev/staging/prod BEFORE merge (delegated to UIC-08); confirmed no backfill in this phase — online backfill decision applies to Phase 2 (AUTHORED edge); picked_reason:UIC-02 是 UIC-01 的前置条件，先做可解锁后续约束 DDL 并减少上下文切换; evidence:DatabaseInitializer 在 schema DDL 前执行 2 个只读 user_id 预检查询，脏数据与查询异常都会抛 IllegalStateException 并阻断后续 DDL; validation_limited:未运行真实 Spring Boot + Neo4j 集成启动验证，未直接观察 @PostConstruct 导致的进程非零退出; manual_test:timeout 60s mvn test -Dtest=DatabaseInitializerTest; evidence:6 个 DatabaseInitializerTest 通过，覆盖预检顺序、只读约束、空 user_id、重复 user_id、预检异常 fail-close; risk:medium 缺少真实容器化启动回归，应用级非零退出仍依赖 Spring Boot 对 @PostConstruct IllegalStateException 的既有语义; done_at:2026-04-21

title: Set status=ACTIVE on register and preserve canonical identity handling
description: Update AuthController.CREATE_USER_QUERY ON CREATE SET block to include user.status='ACTIVE'. Reconfirm (no change): user_id remains server-generated UUID, client-supplied user_id ignored, JWT issuance unchanged, FIND_USER_BY_USERNAME_QUERY and FIND_USER_BY_ID_QUERY untouched, no new JWT claim.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN client sends valid registration request → THEN created node has server-generated UUID user_id, status='ACTIVE', and all pre-existing properties (username, display_name, password_hash, roles, created_at) exactly as before; WHEN client includes user_id in register body → THEN server-generated UUID wins and client value is discarded; WHEN existing query reads pre-change row without status → THEN row still returned and MAY be treated as ACTIVE by callers; SHALL preserve username uniqueness, password hashing, default role assignment, JWT issuance unchanged; ref: specs/user-identity-schema/spec.md:22-34 (R2), 69-81 (R5)
review_initial_requirements: RegisterRequest already has no user_id field and createUser already calls UUID.randomUUID() — reconfirm via inspection not as a new guard; JWT claims (sub=user_id, roles, username, display_name) MUST remain unchanged so frontend authStore.ts:45 parseJwtPayload continues working; ON CREATE SET preserves ordering and all 6 pre-existing fields still set; issueToken MUST NOT gain a new claim
review_regression_requirements: Existing register/login/me flows MUST remain byte-for-byte compatible — run full AuthController integration test suite; JWT payload shape MUST NOT change (frontend authStore depends on sub/roles/username/display_name); rollback: delete 'user.status = ..' line from ON CREATE SET — no other file change; UserPayload response DTO is unchanged (no status leak to API surface)
refs: openspec/changes/user-identity-constraint/specs/user-identity-schema/spec.md:22-34,69-81; openspec/changes/user-identity-constraint/design.md:76-88 (D3); openspec/changes/user-identity-constraint/tasks.md:17-23; src/main/java/com/rhizodelta/infrastructure/security/api/AuthController.java:64-78,131-152,172-183; docs/user-domain-modeling-plan.md (§3.1 认证层 / §5 前端联动); src/test/java/com/rhizodelta/api/AuthApiIntegrationTest.java:62
notes: No DTO or API surface change in this change — frontend requires zero changes; phase-forward compat: later user-profile-split will relocate display_name to UserProfile via HAS_PROFILE edge, this change intentionally keeps it on UserAccount; depends on UIC-01 (status index exists) for full value; picked_reason:UIC-03 在 UIC-01 约束与索引就绪后补齐注册写入 status=ACTIVE，并回归认证接口兼容性; evidence:AuthController CREATE_USER_QUERY 在 ON CREATE SET 中新增 user.status = 'ACTIVE'，未改动 RegisterRequest、UUID 生成、FIND_USER 查询或 issueToken claim 集合; manual_test:timeout 300s mvn test -Dtest=AuthApiIntegrationTest; evidence:6 个 AuthApiIntegrationTest 通过，覆盖注册写入 ACTIVE、忽略客户端 user_id、JWT payload 形状不变、register/login/me 回归以及旧数据缺少 status 的读取兼容性; risk:low 当前集成回归已覆盖接口兼容性，剩余风险主要是未来若新增直接写 UserAccount 的路径未复用注册写入约定; done_at:2026-04-21

title: Integration tests for schema, pre-check, register, constraint enforcement
description: Testcontainers-based integration tests for clean-boot schema visibility, EXPLAIN user_id lookup plan verification, register status=ACTIVE persistence, startup failure on null/duplicate seeded user_id, direct duplicate-write ConstraintValidationFailed, and pre-check read-only invariant. Explicit rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx assertion is removed.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN app boots against clean Neo4j (Testcontainers) → THEN SHOW CONSTRAINTS includes rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique AND SHOW INDEXES includes rhizodelta_user_account_status_idx; WHEN EXPLAIN MATCH (u:UserAccount {user_id: 'test'}) RETURN u → THEN plan contains NodeUniqueIndexSeek; WHEN registering a user via POST /api/auth/register → THEN persisted UserAccount has status='ACTIVE'; WHEN UserAccount pre-seeded with user_id=null before Spring context starts → THEN startup fails with message containing seeded username; WHEN two pre-seeded nodes share user_id → THEN startup fails with message containing duplicated user_id; WHEN direct CREATE via Neo4jClient attempts duplicate user_id → THEN ConstraintValidationFailed; WHEN pre-check runs on clean DB → THEN UserAccount property snapshot identical before and after; ref: specs/user-identity-schema/spec.md:7-20,26-34,40-58,73-81
review_initial_requirements: Tests MUST use fresh Testcontainers Neo4j per test (NOT a shared instance) — p0-p1-backend-foundation CSV historically flagged JNA libjnidispatch.so issues on current env (see 2026-03-10 notes); pre-seed tests MUST bootstrap Neo4j data BEFORE Spring context starts so @PostConstruct sees dirty data; cover null/blank AND duplicate paths in separate tests so failure reason is distinguishable; property snapshot compare validates read-only invariant; DO NOT assert standalone rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx; EXPLAIN verification MUST inspect ResultSummary.plan() for NodeUniqueIndexSeek
review_regression_requirements: These tests are the regression baseline for every future user-domain change; when user-profile-split (Phase 1) relocates display_name, ACTIVE-status register test MUST still pass; NodeUniqueIndexSeek EXPLAIN assertion is the lookup-plan canary and replaces standalone user_id index-name checks; ConstraintValidationFailed test remains the schema-rollback canary — keep in suite even after later phases; if Testcontainers unavailable in CI, document which tests executed manually and why
notes: Blocked by UIC-01+UIC-02+UIC-03 complete; historical validation_limited per issues/2026-03-10_19-45-19-p0-p1-backend-foundation.csv — Testcontainers JNA issue on WSL2; coordinate with CI team on libjnidispatch.so availability; picked_reason:UIC-04 为 user-identity 变更建立独立 Testcontainers 集成基线，覆盖 schema、启动预检与约束异常; evidence:新增 UserIdentitySchemaIntegrationTest 覆盖 7 个 Testcontainers 场景；在原始实现下 6/7 场景通过，唯一失败为 SHOW INDEXES 缺少 rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx; blocker:真实 Neo4j 5 行为与验收冲突——约束优先时 CREATE INDEX rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx 被判定 no effect 且 SHOW INDEXES 不返回该名称；索引优先时 CREATE CONSTRAINT rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique 失败，报错 There already exists an index (:UserAccount {user_id}); manual_test:timeout 300s mvn test -Dtest=UserIdentitySchemaIntegrationTest; risk:high 在未调整规范或数据库策略前，UIC-04 无法闭环提交，否则必须接受失败测试或破坏现有 schema 初始化; split_subtask_a:已删除显式 user_id index DDL，并同步更新 DatabaseInitializerTest 为约束+status 索引断言; manual_test_subtask_a:timeout 60s mvn test -Dtest=DatabaseInitializerTest; evidence_subtask_a:DatabaseInitializerTest 8/8 通过，确认初始化层不再执行 rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx; split_subtask_b:集成测试已切换为 status 索引存在性 + NodeUniqueIndexSeek 计划断言，并保留启动预检/重复写入/只读快照回归; manual_test_subtask_b:timeout 300s mvn test -Dtest=UserIdentitySchemaIntegrationTest; evidence_subtask_b:UserIdentitySchemaIntegrationTest 8/8 通过，覆盖约束存在、status 索引存在、NodeUniqueIndexSeek、register ACTIVE、null/duplicate 启动失败、ConstraintValidationFailed、pre-check 只读; evidence:UIC-04 已按拆分完成，初始化层与集成层均对齐新的 Neo4j 5 验收口径; risk:low 当前剩余风险主要是未来 Neo4j 升级若更改 EXPLAIN 计划节点名称，NodeUniqueIndexSeek 断言需同步调整; done_at:2026-04-21

title: EXPLAIN capture for user_id lookup index usage
description: Execute EXPLAIN MATCH (u:UserAccount {user_id: \$id}) RETURN u against Neo4j with new schema. Confirm plan shows NodeUniqueIndexSeek or NodeIndexSeek on UserAccount(user_id). Paste plan verbatim into PR description.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN EXPLAIN run on user_id lookup with new schema → THEN plan shows NodeUniqueIndexSeek or NodeIndexSeek on UserAccount(user_id); SHALL NOT use AllNodesScan or NodeByLabelScan; plan output captured verbatim in PR body so reviewers can audit index usage; ref: specs/user-identity-schema/spec.md:60-67 (R4)
review_initial_requirements: Operator MUST run EXPLAIN against a booted instance — not copy-paste a generic explanation; capture PLAN output verbatim with line prefixes; D2 rejected relying solely on constraint-backed implicit index — verify standalone named index rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_idx appears in SHOW INDEXES (or confirm the two indexes are functionally equivalent for lookup and document choice)
review_regression_requirements: Re-verify plan after any future schema change that touches UserAccount indexes; re-capture on Neo4j version upgrade (optimizer may change); serves as documented baseline for subsequent user-domain phases — user-profile-split should verify UserProfile(user_id) lookups also use an index
notes: Manual verification — no automated assertion; optionally capture PROFILE db-hits as performance baseline; blocked by UIC-01 (index exists)

title: Runbook section for UserAccount user_id integrity violation
description: Add a short runbook section to Doc/使用手册.md describing the two pre-check failure modes (null/blank vs duplicate) with exact remediation Cypher for each. Confirm docs/user-domain-modeling-plan.md needs no edit (already covers this phase) and API documentation needs no edit (API surface unchanged).
acceptance_criteria: Doc/使用手册.md contains a 'If startup fails with UserAccount user_id integrity violation' section with BOTH failure modes AND exact remediation Cypher (assign UUID vs delete offending row); docs/user-domain-modeling-plan.md left untouched; no API documentation update required (API surface verified unchanged per proposal.md Impact section); ref: tasks.md:40-44
review_initial_requirements: Runbook entry MUST include exact Cypher commands operator runs — generic guidance like 'assign UUID manually' is insufficient; MUST cover BOTH null-case fix AND duplicate-case fix; MUST reference the IllegalStateException message pattern that triggers the runbook; no production credentials or env-specific values in committed doc
review_regression_requirements: Runbook MUST survive subsequent user-domain phases — phrase in terms of 'startup pre-check' semantics not file-specific line numbers; if future phase changes pre-check Cypher, runbook MUST be revised in the same PR; avoid content duplication with docs/user-domain-modeling-plan.md — cross-reference instead
refs: openspec/changes/user-identity-constraint/tasks.md:40-44; Doc/使用手册.md; docs/user-domain-modeling-plan.md (§4 Phase 0 回滚)
notes: Docs-only — blocked by UIC-02 behavior locked (error message format finalized); no API doc change since API surface is preserved (proposal.md Impact 'None' for API)

title: Local rollback drill for schema + register changes
description: Apply schema on local Neo4j by booting the new build, run the current rollback DROP sequence (user_id UNIQUE constraint + status index), then boot a previous build against the same database. Verify registration and login still work. Paste rollback command set verbatim into PR description.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN rollback DROP sequence executed → THEN SHOW CONSTRAINTS and SHOW INDEXES no longer list rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique or rhizodelta_user_account_status_idx; WHEN previous build (without this change) boots against DB after rollback → THEN startup succeeds AND POST /api/auth/register returns 200 AND POST /api/auth/login returns 200; rollback command set documented verbatim in PR description; SHALL be safe to run while application is running; ref: design.md:129-144 (Rollback Plan)
review_initial_requirements: Drill MUST be performed on a DB previously mutated by the new build (NOT a pristine DB) — this confirms that rows carrying status='ACTIVE' do not break previous build reads; document exact sequence with DROP CONSTRAINT / DROP INDEX and IF EXISTS; verify status property is silently ignored by previous build; no data loss expected — existing username-unique constraint preserved; drop sequence MUST match current schema reality (no standalone user_id index)
review_regression_requirements: Drill result MUST be attached to PR body — this change cannot merge without passing rollback proof; establishes invariant: every future user-domain phase MUST include its own rollback drill; design.md Rollback claims drop is safe while app is running — verify claim in drill (no downtime required to DROP); if rollback command set changes in future phases, update this row before execution
notes: Local-only drill — do NOT run against staging/prod; ensures rollback is not theoretical; blocked by UIC-01+UIC-02+UIC-03 complete; picked_reason:UIC-07 可在本机闭环完成，并能验证当前 schema 与注册改动的真实回滚路径; rollback_commands:DROP CONSTRAINT rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique IF EXISTS; DROP INDEX rhizodelta_user_account_status_idx IF EXISTS;; rollback_evidence:新版本在运行中执行 DROP 后，SHOW CONSTRAINTS 不再包含 rhizodelta_user_account_user_id_unique，SHOW INDEXES 不再包含 rhizodelta_user_account_status_idx; old_build_commit:377f75f; old_build_evidence:旧版本在 /tmp/rhizodelta-rollback-old.DB088x 启动成功，并在同一数据库上 login(rollback-current-2)=200, register(rollback-old-new)=200; manual_test:当前版本 mvn spring-boot:run --server.port=18080 + 旧版本 mvn spring-boot:run --server.port=18081 + docker exec cypher-shell SHOW/DROP 校验; risk:low 已验证 status=ACTIVE 不破坏旧版读取；剩余风险主要是未来若再次引入新的 schema 对象，回滚命令集合需要同步维护; done_at:2026-04-21

title: Pre-deploy audit of user_id integrity across environments
description: Run null/blank and duplicate user_id audit Cypher against dev/staging/prod BEFORE merge. Record row counts in PR. Resolve any violations in-env before release. Verify CI runs new integration tests against a fresh Neo4j Testcontainer (not shared).
acceptance_criteria: Null/blank audit Cypher (MATCH (u:UserAccount) WHERE u.user_id IS NULL OR trim(u.user_id)='' RETURN count(u)) executed against dev/staging/prod with counts recorded in PR; duplicate audit Cypher (MATCH (u:UserAccount) WITH u.user_id AS uid, count(*) AS n WHERE n>1 RETURN uid,n) executed against each env with counts recorded; ALL env counts == 0 BEFORE release PR merged; CI config verified to use fresh Neo4j Testcontainer per test (not shared instance); ref: design.md Open Question Q1; tasks.md:52-57
review_initial_requirements: Audit MUST run BEFORE merge — it is the release gate; record null/blank AND duplicate counts separately per env; if prod not directly accessible, obtain read-only Cypher session via DBA with output attached to PR; if test fixtures in any env create user_id-less rows, refactor fixtures before release
review_regression_requirements: Gate MUST run before EVERY subsequent user-domain phase release (user-profile-split, user-authored-edge) even if later phase does not add a new user_id constraint — serves as canary; CI Testcontainer discipline is an invariant for all user-domain integration tests going forward; future per-env data migrations MUST reference this audit as baseline
notes: 待澄清 — design.md Open Q1: does any ops environment have manually-imported UserAccount rows without UUID user_id? Answer via this audit before merge; if yes, resolve in-env before release; also gates CI Testcontainer isolation discipline for all future user-domain changes
